title: Fix LLM entity-targeting confusion — /summon targets bot instead of entity
description:
When asked to summon lightning on the "nearest" slime, Leo targeted himself instead. The LLM needs clearer entity-position awareness in the system prompt so it can distinguish between summoning at bot position vs entity position.

From chat: "[DEBUG] Leo summoned a bolt on himself instead of the slime. Leo: query for the nearest slime, then use /summon at that XYZ"

The entity observation data is already in the LLM prompt (TSK-0242), but the LLM doesn't consistently use entity coordinates for /summon targets. The prompt should include explicit guidance that /summon commands should use entity coordinates when targeting entities.
